provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Immunities and Privileges (Fourth Schedule) (Exemption) Order, 2002.

provisions.title: Exemption
provisions.content: The staff, other than those provided for in section 13(1)(b) of an organization specified in the Third Schedule, shall, within twenty four months of first arrival into the country, be entitled to import a motor vehicle free of customs and excise duties, including value added tax.

provisions.title: Other Staff
provisions.content: For purposes of this Order, the entitlement granted under section 2 above shall, until 30 June, 2002 also be deemed as applicable to the same category of staff who, having resided in the country since 1 st January, 1996 and no later than 30 th June, 2000, have not exercised the privilege therein granted.
